purpose: OpenAQ air-quality measurements and metadata for pollutant/location/time needs.
applies_if: Need asks for ambient pollutant measurements, monitoring locations, or OpenAQ API data.
excludes_if: Need is EPA-only AirData, emissions inventory, weather, or model output.
access_notes: OpenAQ v3 programmatic API requests require a registered API key sent in the X-API-Key header.
OpenAQ also documents a full data archive on the Open Data on AWS path; use only official APIs, export functions, or sanctioned archive access.
Concrete API requests require pollutant, location, and time-window validation.
Provider coverage and API paging must be checked downstream.
future_verification_hints: Resolver should validate parameter names, location ids, time bounds, and paging before any acquisition.
